# Studio Happens Sign

> Free PDF document signing platform. Upload a PDF, place signature fields, and share a link. Recipients sign from any browser with no account required. Documents are automatically deleted after 30 days.

Studio Happens Sign is an open-source e-signature tool built for agencies and freelancers. It handles contracts, NDAs, invoices, and any other PDF that needs a signature. There is no monthly fee, no per-document charge, and no watermark on signed PDFs.

The platform was designed and built by [Studio Happens](https://studiohappens.tech), a creative and marketing agency.

## How it works

1. Upload a PDF (no account needed for guest mode).
2. Place signature fields, name fields, or date fields on the page.
3. Share the signing link by email, WhatsApp, or any other way.
4. The recipient opens the link in their browser, draws their signature with a finger or mouse, and submits. No app to install.
5. Both parties download the signed PDF immediately.

## Key features

- No account required to send or sign a document.
- Agency signature: save a reusable signature that stamps into the document automatically when the client signs (counter-signature).
- Email notifications via Resend when a client signs.
- Bring your own Supabase database: files go into your own storage bucket and never touch Studio Happens servers.
- 250 MB storage per account; documents auto-delete at 30 days.
- Open source under the MIT licence.

## Pricing

Free. No plans, no tiers, no credit card required.

## Technical details

- Built with Next.js (App Router), Supabase (auth + storage), and PDF-lib for stamping.
- Service-role keys for bring-your-own-database mode are encrypted with AES-256-GCM at rest.
- Each signing link uses a unique random token. Files are stored in private buckets with no public access.
- Self-hostable on Render, Vercel, or any Node.js host. Requires two Supabase projects and a Resend account for email.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sign.studiohappens.tech): Overview, features, and comparison with DocuSign.
- [Sign a document (guest)](https://sign.studiohappens.tech/guest): Upload and send a PDF without creating an account.
- [Create account](https://sign.studiohappens.tech/admin/signup): Register for a persistent dashboard.
- [Documentation](https://sign.studiohappens.tech/docs): Setup guide, self-hosting instructions, environment variables, and troubleshooting for common errors.
- [FAQ](https://sign.studiohappens.tech/faq): Answers to common questions about signing, storage, security, and self-hosting.
- [Contact](https://sign.studiohappens.tech/contact): Email support, GitHub issues, and Studio Happens website link.
